title: Happy Brontosaurus Dinosaur Coloring Page
seoTitle: Free Simple Brontosaurus Coloring Page - Easy PDF Printable
seoDescription: Download our free cartoon brontosaurus dinosaur coloring page. Features bold outlines and large spaces, perfect for toddlers and young kids.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Brontosaurus Dinosaur was a genus of gigantic quadrupedal sauropod dinosaurs that lived during the Late Jurassic epoch, around 150 million years ago.
Brontosaurus Dinosaur had a long, whip-like tail that it could swing at high speeds to deter attackers or communicate with its herd.
